title: Calcium — recommended daily allowance
body: Calcium — recommended dietary allowance by life stage: child 9–13 1300 mg/day, adolescent 14–18 1300 mg/day, adult 19–50 1000 mg/day, adult male 51–70 1000 mg/day, adult female 51–70 1200 mg/day, adult 71+ 1200 mg/day. Verified nutrition reference.
author: engine

title: Iron — recommended daily allowance
body: Iron — recommended dietary allowance by life stage: child 9–13 8 mg/day, adolescent 14–18 male 11 mg/day, adolescent 14–18 female 15 mg/day, adult male 8 mg/day, adult female 19–50 18 mg/day, adult female 51+ 8 mg/day, pregnant 27 mg/day, lactating 9 mg/day. Verified nutrition reference.
author: engine

title: Vitamin c — recommended daily allowance
body: Vitamin c — recommended dietary allowance by life stage: child 9–13 45 mg/day, adolescent 14–18 male 75 mg/day, adolescent 14–18 female 65 mg/day, adult male 90 mg/day, adult female 75 mg/day, pregnant 85 mg/day, lactating 120 mg/day. Verified nutrition reference.
author: engine

title: Vitamin d — recommended daily allowance
body: Vitamin d — recommended dietary allowance by life stage: adult male 600 IU/day, adult female 600 IU/day, adult 70+ 800 IU/day. Verified nutrition reference.
author: engine
